src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Replace the deprecated no-argument httpBasic() method with the new Customizer.withDefaults() variant required by Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Replace deprecated getRawStatusCode() with getStatusCode() to align with Spring Framework 6.x API changes.
Replace Boolean wrapper with boolean primitive to align with Spring Boot 3.x JPA provider expectations and fix deprecation warnings.
Change method parameter type from int to boolean to align with Spring Data JPA query derivation best practices and fix deprecation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.0.1 to 3.1.4 to access newer features and bug fixes.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2022.0.0 to 2022.0.4 for compatibility with the new Spring Boot version.
Remove the explicit spring-cloud-starter-bootstrap dependency as it is no longer required or handled differently in newer Spring Cloud versions.
Replace the legacy Apache HttpClient 4.x dependency with HttpClient 5.x to align with modern standards and Spring Boot 3.x defaults.
Update Apache POI version from 4.1.1 to 4.1.2 for minor bug fixes.
Update maven-release-plugin from 3.0.0-M6 to 3.0.1 for stability.
Update Checkstyle version from 9.2 to 10.10.0 to support newer Java syntax and rules.
Remove explicit encoding configuration from checkstyle plugin as it defaults to UTF-8 or is inherited from project properties.

.github/workflows/main.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for the build matrix.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven wrapper distribution URL to use Maven 3.9.1 instead of 3.8.6.

README.md.general_idea: Update the README description to reflect the migration from Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Spring Boot 2.x example application.' to 'Spring Boot 3.x example application.'

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Replace deprecated bootstrap context configuration with Spring Boot 3.x native config import mechanism.
Define the application name property required for Spring Cloud Config client identification.
Add username and password properties for authenticating with the Spring Cloud Config server.
Enable fail-fast behavior for Spring Cloud Config to fail startup if config server is unreachable.
Set the active profile for Spring Cloud Config to integration.
Add encryption key for Spring Cloud Config data encryption.
Disable the config import check to allow graceful degradation or specific test scenarios.

src/test/resources/test.properties.general_idea: Explicitly disable the config server import mechanism to prevent connection attempts during tests, addressing a known Spring Cloud Config issue.
